raw: {"perspective": "Legal Advisor", "position": "for", "argument": "The TOP 3 things Atlas should do RIGHT NOW with the EIN are: (1) Verify 83(b) election status to avoid duplicate filing and potential $150 loss, (2) Open a Mercury bank account to enable business operations and receive payments, and (3) Review and activate Stripe Atlas perks to leverage incorporation benefits. These priorities ensure compliance, facilitate business operations, and maximize incorporation benefits.", "strongest_counter": "Some may argue that filing for an ITIN should be the top priority, but given the potential for duplicate 83(b) election filing and associated costs, verifying the current status takes precedence.", "evidence_cited": "CEO correction Session 86, Session 112, and research on Stripe Atlas incorporation benefits", "whistleblower_flag": "null"}
argument: The TOP 3 things Atlas should do RIGHT NOW with the EIN are: (1) Verify 83(b) election status to avoid duplicate filing and potential $150 loss, (2) Open a Mercury bank account to enable business operations and receive payments, and (3) Review and activate Stripe Atlas perks to leverage incorporation benefits. These priorities ensure compliance, facilitate business operations, and maximize incorporation benefits.
strongest_counter: Some may argue that filing for an ITIN should be the top priority, but given the potential for duplicate 83(b) election filing and associated costs, verifying the current status takes precedence.
evidence_cited: CEO correction Session 86, Session 112, and research on Stripe Atlas incorporation benefits
